Hero.label: RELIABLE LOGISTICS PARTNER AT TA LUNG INTERNATIONAL BORDER GATE
Hero.title:
CONNECTING BORDERS
REACHING GLOBALLY
Hero.subtitle: Over 15 years of experience in warehouse operations, customs procedures, and international transportation. We provide fast, safe, and cost-effective clearance solutions for businesses.

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: Over 15 years of creating Logistics solutions at Ta Lung International Border Gate

intro.title: GENERAL INTRODUCTION
intro.content:
Phu Anh Trading and Transport Co., Ltd. (brand name Ta Lung Logistics) was established in 2008. Following the promotion of trade between Vietnam and China through the Ta Lung International Border Gate - Cao Bang, the company invested in a system of warehouses and gathering points for import-export goods in the area.

The company specializes in: Warehousing; Bus stations; Import-Export; Logistics; and International transportation by road, sea, and rail.

AboutPage.missionText: Our mission is to provide transparent, efficient, and sustainable logistics solutions. Our vision is to become a key hub connecting trade between China and Vietnam.

timeline.stage1_text: Established Phu Anh Trading and Transport Co., Ltd., began cross-border transport operations.
timeline.stage2_text: Completed investment in a 3-yard system (25 ha), meeting high standards for storage and transshipment.
timeline.stage3_text: Establish an integrated service chain of Ta Lung - Chi Ma, becoming a key node in China-Vietnam trade.

facilities.warehouseContent: Owning 3 main yards (Phu Anh, Vu Thanh, Son Cang) with a total area of up to 25 hectares. We meet all storage and transshipment needs to the highest standards.
facilities.transportContent: Providing a variety of trucks to suit all customer needs. We own a fleet with diverse load capacities, ensuring we meet multimodal transport requirements.

3.title: Arrange Vehicles
3.desc: Receive and arrange vehicles to the transshipment area

5.title: Complete
5.desc: Finalize vehicle procedures and hand over goods

vision.title: DEVELOPMENT ORIENTATION
vision.content:
We are currently completing our infrastructure, focusing on building high-standard warehouse and logistics facilities.

The long-term goal is to fully integrate business activities into the border gate system formed by Ta Lung and Chi Ma, establishing an integrated service chain along the Vietnam-China border. Ta Lung Logistics will become a crucial hub connecting China-Vietnam trade.

WhyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us?
WhyChooseUs.point1Text: Applying real-time tracking technology, smart warehouse management (WMS), and electronic customs declaration.
WhyChooseUs.point2Text: Our team of experienced experts is always ready to advise and support 24/7.
WhyChooseUs.point3Text: Located right at the Ta Lung International Border Gate, a vital trade connection between Vietnam and China.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.description: We are always ready to listen. Connect with Ta Lung Logistics through the information below or send your request via the contact form.

faq.q1: What are the company's working hours?
faq.a1: Our administrative office is open from 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM (Mon - Sat). However, our field team at the Ta Lung International Border Gate operates 24/7 to ensure continuous cargo clearance.
faq.q2: How can I track my shipment?
faq.a2: You can use the 'Tracking' feature on the menu, enter your Air Waybill (AWB) number to see real-time status, or contact our Hotline for support.
faq.q3: Does Ta Lung Logistics handle Less than Container Load (LCL) shipments?
faq.a3: Yes. We provide solutions for both LCL and Full Container Load (FCL) shipments between Vietnam and China with optimal costs and stable schedules.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Use
TermsPage.content:
Welcome to the official website of Ta Lung Logistics (under Phu Anh Trading and Transport Co., Ltd.).

By accessing and using talunglogistics.com, you agree to comply with the terms and conditions set forth below.

### 1. USER RIGHTS AND RESPONSIBILITIES
- Users are responsible for providing accurate information when using quote or contact forms.
- Any use of the website for malicious purposes, attacks, or unauthorized access is strictly prohibited.

### 2. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
- All content, images, and trademarks on this site are the property of Ta Lung Logistics.
- Any unauthorized copying or use for commercial purposes is a violation.

### 3. DISCLAIMER
- The information on this website is for reference purposes only. We are not liable for any loss arising from the use of this information.

### 4. CHANGES TO TERMS
Ta Lung Logistics reserves the right to amend these terms at any time.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.content:
Ta Lung Logistics is committed to protecting your personal information.

This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data when you visit our website.

### 1. INFORMATION COLLECTION
We collect information you provide via contact forms, including: Full name, email, phone number.

### 2. USE OF INFORMATION
Your information is used to contact you, respond to requests, and improve our services.

### 3. SECURITY AND SHARING
We are committed to not sharing your information with any third party without your consent, unless required by law.

### 4. YOUR RIGHTS
You have the right to request access to, correct, or delete your personal information by contacting us at: **info@talunglogistics.com**.
